## User ask (verbatim)
Compare EU AI Act applicability vs. GPAI obligations for our Q1 2026 planning.

## Intake decisions
- **Consent:** Operator agreed to governed `system.note` path (no outbound).
- **Routing:** Research owns evidence + digest proposal next.
- **Bundle id:** `flagship-bundle-eu-ai-act-001` (pair with Research proposal).

## Out of scope for Alfred
No sources, no claims — Research produces the `ResearchEvidencePack`.
